  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "Amdahl's law states that the maximum theoretical speedup that can be achieved in a parallel system is limited by the fraction of the program that cannot be parallelized. Which of the following is a direct consequence of Amdahl's law?",
      "options": [
        "A) The speedup of a parallel program will always be limited by the number of processors.",
        "B) The speedup of a parallel program will always be limited by the sequential portion of the
